groupings.title: Secrets
groupings.description: Agent-safe secret management with hal-vault: SSH-key encrypted storage, tag search, and masked-by-default output.

groupings.title: Media
groupings.description: Agent-safe image handling with ImageMagick: read metadata, resize/crop/composite/montage/watermark/convert, and lossless compression before sending so images stay small and never leak local paths.

groupings.title: Deploy
groupings.description: Publish static sites to shareable URLs. cloudflare-drop drives the browser to drag-and-drop a folder or zip onto Cloudflare Drop and returns a live *.workers.dev preview in seconds — no account, no build — always flagging the 60-minute expiry and failing open rather than inventing a link.
